title: Japanese-Style Oat Porridge
description: Warm and comforting, this Japanese-style oat porridge is made with rich and creamy flavors.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Add the oats and reduce heat to low; simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the milk, honey, vanilla extract, and green tea.
Continue to simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Serve warm, topped with your choice of toppings if desired.
